rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHERINE ESTHER HINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Equitable Lien And Distribution From The Estate To Petitioner, Karen Taylor, Pursuant To The Court'S Order Dated October 17, 2017
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 8th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES (may addressed at hearing. matter may be taken off calendar if petitioner fails to appear at this hearing): 1) Petitioner has not filed a response to following Examiner Notes: a. Petitioner has not given notice of the petition on the mandatory judicial council form DE-120. b. Please provide proof for all requested expenses. c. A hard copy of the proposed order must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 14.93). [Proposed orders may not be e-filed.] 2) Karen Taylor is requesting: a. The final account include an equitable distribution to petitioner in an amount that equals the co-heirs' share of the estate expenses paid between 2008 and 2018. b. Petitioner be allowed an equitable distribution out of the estate as reimbursement for estate expenses paid between 2008 and 2018 in an amount to be calculated by the Administrator and Trustee.
